TEXT.citation: Wilang Yutas. (2019). YouTube channel. YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/@wilangyutas9297
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{wilangyutas_channel, author = {{Wilang Yutas}}, title = {Wilang Yutas YouTube Channel}, year = {2019}, howpublished = {\url{https://www.youtube.com/@wilangyutas9297}}, note = {YouTube channel} }

S.FORM: knan qani ga, mqyanux saku m'yutas lpi!
S.PHON: knan qani ɣa, mqjanux saku mʔjutas lpi!
S.FORM: knan qani ga, mqyanux saku m'yutas lpi!
S.PHON: knan qani ɣa, mqjanux s~ɕaku mʔjutas~ɕ lpi!

S.FORM: kwara qson ma taywang qani ga ne
S.PHON: kwara qson ma tajwaŋ qani ɣa ne
S.FORM: kwara qson ma taywang qani ga ne
S.PHON: kwara qs~ɕon ma tajwaŋ qani ɣa ne

S.FORM: simu nyuw galan son mha i son mha i
S.PHON: simu njuw ɣalan son mħa i son mħa i
S.FORM: simu nyuw galan son mha i son mha i
S.PHON: s~ɕimu njuw ɣalan s~ɕon mħa i s~ɕon mħa i

S.FORM: nyux smbesan ni i yaba Utux gwagiq na
S.PHON: njux smβ~vesan ni i jaβ~va utux ɣwaɣiq na
S.FORM: nyux smbesan ni i yaba Utux gwagiq na
S.PHON: njux s~ɕmβes~ɕan ni i jaβa utux ɣwaɣiq na

S.FORM: ga nway baqun laqi' mqyanux i gaga na Tayal ru mha nanu kinhulan ru mha nanu mqyanux
S.PHON: ɣa nwaj β~vaqun laqiʔ mqjanux i ɣaɣa na tajal ru mħa nanu kinħulan ru mħa nanu mqjanux
S.FORM: ga nway baqun laqi' mqyanux i gaga na Tayal ru mha nanu kinhulan ru mha nanu mqyanux
S.PHON: ɣa nwaj βaqun laqiʔ mqjanux i ɣaɣa na tajal ru mħa nanu kinħulan ru mħa nanu mqjanux

S.FORM: yasa qa nyux saku nya ngon pi, balay ga mo icigacu nici'
S.PHON: jasa qa njux saku nja ŋon pi, β~valaj ɣa mo iʦiɣaʦu niʦiʔ
S.FORM: yasa qa nyux saku nya ngon pi, balay ga mo icigacu nici'
S.PHON: jas~ɕa qa njux s~ɕaku nja ŋon pi, βalaj ɣa mo iʦ~ʨiɣaʦ~ʨu niʦ~ʨiʔ
